name: Targa Resources Corp.
business: Targa Resources Corp. provides midstream services including gathering, compressing, treating, processing, transporting, and purchasing/selling natural gas; transporting, storing, fractionating, treating, and purchasing/selling NGLs and NGL products; and gathering, storing, terminaling, and purchasing/selling crude oil. It operates in two segments: Gathering and Processing, and Logistics and Transportation.
sellsTo: natural gas and crude oil producers
petrochemical, industrial, commercial and export markets

exposures.sentence: We are engaged primarily in the business of: gathering, compressing, treating, processing, transporting, and purchasing and selling natural gas; transporting, storing, fractionating, treating, and purchasing and selling NGLs and NGL products, including services to LPG exporters; and gathering, storing, terminaling, and purchasing and selling crude oil.

We acquired a portfolio of complementary Permian Basin midstream infrastructure assets, including approximately 480 miles of natural gas pipelines, approximately 180 MMcf/d of cryogenic natural gas processing and sour treating capacity, carbon capture activities generating 45Q tax credits, and a small crude oil gathering system.

catalysts.event: Bull Moose plant commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Bull Moose plant in Permian Delaware (the Bull Moose plant), commenced operations in the first quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Pembrook II plant commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Pembrook II plant in Permian Midland (the Pembrook II plant), commenced operations in the third quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Bull Moose II plant commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Bull Moose II plant in Permian Delaware (the Bull Moose II plant), commenced operations in the fourth quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: East Pembrook plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: East Pembrook plant in Permian Midland (the East Pembrook plant), expected to begin operations in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Falcon II plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Falcon II plant in Permian Delaware (the Falcon II plant), expected to begin operations in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: East Driver plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: East Driver plant in Permian Midland (the East Driver plant), expected to begin operations in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Copperhead plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Copperhead plant in Permian Delaware (the Copperhead plant), expected to begin operations in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Yeti plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Yeti plant in Permian Delaware (the Yeti plant), expected to begin operations in the third quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Yeti II plant expected commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: Yeti II plant in Permian Delaware (the Yeti II plant), expected to begin operations in the fourth quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: GCF fractionation facility reactivation and commencement
catalysts.sentence: GCF commenced operations in the first quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Train 11 fractionation train expected commencement
catalysts.sentence: Train 11 in Mont Belvieu, Texas (Train 11), expected to begin operations in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Train 12 fractionation train expected commencement
catalysts.sentence: Train 12 in Mont Belvieu, Texas (Train 12), expected to begin operations in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Train 13 fractionation train expected commencement
catalysts.sentence: Train 13 in Mont Belvieu, Texas (Train 13), expected to begin operations in the first quarter of 2028.

catalysts.event: Delaware Express NGL pipeline expansion expected operations
catalysts.sentence: The expansion is expected to begin operations in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Speedway NGL Pipeline expected operations
catalysts.sentence: Speedway is expected to begin operations in the third quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: GPMT LPG Export Expansion expected completion
catalysts.sentence: The GPMT LPG Export Expansion is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Bull Run Extension expected operations
catalysts.sentence: The Bull Run Extension is expected to begin operations in the first quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Buffalo Run expected full completion
catalysts.sentence: Buffalo Run is expected to be completed in stages and fully complete in early 2028.

catalysts.event: Forza Pipeline expected operations
catalysts.sentence: Forza filed a certificate application on December 3, 2025, with the FERC and, pending receipt of necessary regulatory approvals, is expected to begin operations in the middle of 2028.

catalysts.event: Blackcomb pipeline expected in service
catalysts.sentence: The Blackcomb pipeline is designed to transport up to 2.5 Bcf/d of natural gas through approximately 365 miles of 42-inch pipeline from the Permian Basin in West Texas to the Agua Dulce area in South Texas and is expected to be in service in the fourth quarter of 2026, pending the receipt of customary regulatory and other approvals.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Blackstone's 45% interest in Targa Badlands
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we completed the acquisition of Blackstone's 45% interest in Targa Badlands LLC (Targa Badlands) for aggregate consideration of $1.8 billion in cash (the Badlands Transaction).

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Stakeholder Midstream, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, we completed the acquisition of Stakeholder Midstream, LLC for $1.25 billion in cash (the Stakeholder Acquisition).
